Assignment Rule Name: Sexual and Sex-Based Harassment Awareness (Leaders - Positive Duty Training)
Assignment Rule Description: This manager course looks at sexual and sex-based harassment in the workplace. Learning outcomes for leaders include: - Define sexual harassment and sex-based harassment - Identify the different types of sexual harassment and sex-based harassment - Respond appropriately if you witness or experience sexual harassment or sex-based harassment - Explain the complaint procedures available to staff - Implement various strategies for managing complaints - Identify relevant internal policies and resources
